sourceCaption:
📢📢  If it's Tuesday, it must be... Cluesday!

Join us for Edition 528, hosted by *Vishnu Suresh* (not to be confused with Suresh Vishnu), who promises a li'l bit of this and a li'l bit of that for everyone — music, movies, literature, art, sports... and a couple of surprise rounds that you might not see coming!

If you're a first-timer...

*What is Cluesday?* It's a pub quiz where...

⭐ Correct answers are appreciated, but PJs and bad puns earn bigger applause

⭐ Heckling the QM is a competitive sport — but not of the WWE kind

⭐ Answering bonus questions gets you house special shots 

⭐ If you shout loudly enough, the QM gives clues (it's called Cluesday for a reason, duh!)

⭐ And most importantly, anyone can host, provided you've attended for three straight weeks.

Here are the deets:

⏱️ February 24, Tuesday. 9:30 PM to 11:30PM.

📍 Vapour, Indiranagar 100 ft. Road
 https://maps.app.goo.gl/VA5fisJYLVAGS6te7

🎟️ No entry fee. No prior registration

🙋🏻‍♂️ Up to 4 people to a team/table. 

🖊️ It's a written quiz, but no need to carry writing implements. Answer sheets and pencils will be given.

🍻 If you win, your table's booze bill is on the house

For queries contact: +91 88617 52004

name: Purple Riband Quiz 2026
description:
**A quiz For Women, By Women, About Women**
**Celebrating International Women's Day**

Quiz Foundation of India is proud to present the second edition of the PURPLE RIBAND QUIZ on Sunday 8th March 2026 at 3 PM in Chennai for International Women’s Day.

This quiz is **an ALL WOMEN event** - a quiz entirely For Women, By Women, About Women.

The **four QUIZ HOSTS** are also women – Saranya Jayakumar, Jayashree Mohanka, Nirupama V, and Vanshi Mudaliar. Together, they represent four generations of exceptional quizzing talent.

This is a **FUN AND FRIENDLY** quiz about women and women-oriented themes. **ANY WOMAN OF ANY AGE** can take part as TEAMS of any two members. But don’t worry if you don’t have a team – we will put you in a team at the venue.

We also invite you on the day, to share **your thoughts and ideas** on how to improve women’s participation in Quizzing.

And what’s a celebration without some **live music**? That’s there too!

Your participation also **supports the women of THE BANYAN** – women living in homelessness with mental health conditions.

**Men?** You’re welcome as patrons to spectate and cheer the ladies!

name: ICONIQ Quizverse Challenge
description:
**Shiv Nadar Foundation** presents the **ICONIQ Quizverse Challenge**—a nationwide inter-college quiz contest.

**Stages of the Contest:**
- **Daily Game:** 8 MCQs to be answered in quick time.
- **Team Formation:** Participants pair up in teams of two with both members from the same college.
- **Selection Tests:** Top performers qualify for the next stage.
- **City Prelims:** Virtual quiz rounds.
- **Zonal Finals:** Live, on-ground quiz contests.
- **National Finale:** The final live, on-ground national quiz showdown.

**Prizes:**
- ₹25 Lakh contest prize pool
- ₹10 Lakh to be won at the National Final

**Last Day to Register:** 21st February
sourceCaption:
Dear Quizzer,
The Shiv Nadar Foundation, in collaboration with Tree of Knowledge, invites you to participate in the ICONIQ Quizverse Challenge—a nationwide, Inter-College General Knowledge quiz competition.

Prizes worth *₹25,00,000*, including *₹10,00,000* at the National Final. 

✅ Eligibility: College students (18+)
🚫 *No entry fee* 
👥 Team of 2 (from the same college)

How to play: 
●	Register on app.quizzitok.com 
●	Play the quiz daily and qualify for the All-India quiz, followed by City Prelims, Zonal Finals, and the National Final

Good luck!

name: Unfamiliar World Quiz and TNG Quiz
description:
**QFI's Winter Carnival** continues with:
- **Unfamiliar World Quiz**
- **TNG Quiz** in the afternoon

Join us for another exciting day of quizzing!
sourceCaption:
QFI's Winter Carnival got off to a brisk start with the Unusual Suspects Quiz on a crispy cold Chennai morning (yes, we know, we can scarcely believe we typed those words out) at the Kavikko auditorium.

A hall-ful of teams wrote the prelims which was a high scoring affair with the toppers, 'Misa Suspects' (Samyuktha, Sibi, Ajaykrishna) scoring a stratospheric 25 out of 30. 

The final was a close run thing, the leads exchanged multiple times, and on this form, the usual suspects had better watch out. 

It came down to the last question where Youth and Local Knowledge represented by "Saturday Surprise Check" (Abineet, Arjun, Manoj - all studying at IIT Madras), pounced and answered the last question correctly to win by a narrow margin over Experience personified by the ABCs consisting of Harish Swaminathan, Shriram Narayanan and Aravind Sridharan. 

The team "Unusual and Suspect" consisting of warhorses VV Ramanan, Varun Parthasarathy and Srinivasan Ramani finished 3rd, and a splendid time was had by all.

Join us again tomorrow (25 Jan, Sunday) at 9:30 am for the Unfamiliar World Quiz and the TNG Quiz in the afternoon!

name: The DBS Bank Republic Day Quiz 2026
description:
**SCOLYMPICS PRESENTS: The DBS Bank Republic Day Quiz 2026**

Ladies, gentlemen, and quiz enthusiasts of all stripes—the wait is over!

After 20+ glorious years of stumping India’s brightest (and bravest), the *DBS Bank Republic Day Quiz* is back. Yes, THAT quiz. The one you've been secretly training for while pretending to work from home.

**The Basics**:
- **Format**: General quiz (translation: anything goes)
- **Team size**: 3 members
- **Team composition**: Literally anyone. Your genius colleague. Your 12-year-old niece. That neighbor who won't stop talking about cryptocurrency. We don't judge.

**Why bother?** Because your patriotic duty isn't just about flag-hoisting—it's about not spending Republic Day morning in your pajamas scrolling through memes. Instead, spend it with us, wrestling with questions ranging from "Wait, I actually know this!" to "Is this even a real word?"

**Your Quizmasters**: The dream team is back—*Anustup Datta, Gopal Kidao, Movin Miranda, and Rajiv Rai*. Over 125 years of combined quizzing expertise. Zero mercy.

So rally your troops, shake off the holiday lethargy, and show up ready to buzz, bluff, and (hopefully) triumph.

*Because sitting at home is comfortable, but glory? Glory requires getting off the couch.*

All details in the poster. Mark your calendars. Sharpen your pencils. Google nothing.

See you there!

– _Team Scolympics_
eligibility: Literally anyone. Your genius colleague. Your 12-year-old niece. That neighbor who won't stop talking about cryptocurrency. We don't judge.

name: Unfamiliar World Open 2026
description:
**Unfamiliar World Open 2026**

- Originally, the name was slightly longer, referring to the acronymized version of a phrase that meant, "Everyone benefits from joint cooperation".
- Coincidentally, the acronym itself could be translated as 'the fir', which is why they adopted the iconic tree logo designed by Raymond Loewy.
- Eventually, the first two letters were dropped.

**Question:** Which firm is this? Rather aptly, the four-letter name of the firm means 'save' in Dutch.

name: TNG General Open 2026
description:
**TNG General Open 2026**

In heraldry, the position of the bird or beast in a coat of arms is called the attitude. For example, if a beast is depicted standing up, forepaws raised, it is said to be 'rampant'.

If the beast walks towards the viewer's left with one forepaw raised, the attitude is a term that derives from Old French for 'striding' or 'passing'. More familiar to chess players, *what is this attitude called?*

description:

sourceCaption:
*KQA QUIZZES ON MARCH 8 AT UJJIVAN*

The KQA will be conducting *two open quizzes on March 8 (Sunday)* at the Ujjivan head office in Koramangala.

*1030 AM: Third Bell -- the Performing Arts Quiz* by Archana tries to cover the distance from Broadway to Thekkady with some interesting BTS (Behind the Scenes) trivia thrown in between. 

It is a written quiz for teams of up to 2, open to all. 

On the spot registration. Rs. 200/team. Registration waived for school and college teams.

*3 PM: The Purple Riband Quiz by QFI*-- We will be running the Purple Riband Quiz organized by QFI that is being run at the same time in Madras (and perhaps other cities)!

From them: 

_"The Blue Riband is an award given to the fastest passenger ship to cross the Atlantic Ocean. So why not a women-themed general knowledge quiz for the Purple Ribbon on the occasion of International Women's Day?"_

A women-themed general knowledge quiz for all.

This is a prelims/finals quiz that is open to all ages for teams of 2 or 3 with at least one woman on the team. This is not a solo quiz. 

QMs: Saranya Jayakumar, Jayashree Mohanka, Nirupama Venkatasubramanian, Vanshi Mudaliar

On the spot registration, ₹300/team. Registration free for school and college participants.

Venue: Ujjivan Head Office, Koramangala https://maps.app.goo.gl/GX4DPxF9h5vwio866

Please note that we will be starting and ending on time. Do report for the quiz 10 min before scheduled start time.

DM in case of any queries. 

--

Follow us on Twitter and Instagram (@kqaquizzes) for updates, and on Threads and Facebook (@kqaquizzes) for deathly silence.

name: International Women's Day Quiz
description:
**A quiz on the weekend around International Women's Day** (aka a Feminist Discourse masquerading as a quiz) has been an integral part of our calendar since 2020, and Maitreyi Gupta has been a permanent fixture as far as that quiz is concerned. This year, she will be joined by fellow Lodha Enchante denizen Sreemathy Surender, who after a widely acclaimed debut session earlier this season will return to the helm of affairs. Expect lots to learn about the contribution of women to life as we know it, while you cheer for our remarkable duo of question writers.

- **Date:** Sunday 8 March
- **Time:** 1.30 pm
- **Venue:** Rajyog Family Restaurant and Bar
- **Eligibility:** Open for everyone to participate
- **Registration:** No prior registration or fees, and teams to be formed on the spot.
sourceCaption:

Expect lots to learn about the contribution of women to life as we know it, while you cheer for our remarkable duo of question writers.

1.30 pm, Sunday 8 March. Rajyog Family Restaurant and Bar. No prior registration or fees, and teams to be formed on the spot. And yes, to pre-empt the question, the quiz is open for everyone to participate - in which sense, it is of women, by women, but for all.

name: The Quizzitch Cup
description:
**For over a decade, The Quizzitch Cup has been the defining stage of QuizInc’s legacy, celebrating excellence, intellect, and unrelenting passion.** It is where knowledge meets courage, and the sharpest minds rise through strategy, speed, and brilliance. From electrifying buzzer clashes to unforgettable finales, it has shaped champions and created moments that endure.

As we step into our 15th milestone edition, we unveil the emblem of this historic chapter. The new logo reflects strength, perseverance, and the spirit of competition that drives us forward. More than a design, it represents our journey and the battles of wit that have built this tradition.

Today, the symbol stands revealed. A new chapter begins, the stage is set once again, and the pursuit of greatness calls. The only question is—are you ready to rise?
